---
title: "R Markdown + Quarto Quick Reference"
subtitle: "Keep this open during the workshop"
author: "R. Burke Squires"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

## Safe learner files

| Part of day | File to edit |
|---|---|
| Morning R Markdown | `student_work/morning_report.Rmd` |
| Bridge conversion | A copy named `student_work/bridge_converted.qmd` |
| Quarto and capstone | `student_work/my_report.qmd` |
| Parameters demonstration | `student_work/parameter_demo.qmd` |

Do not edit the root `_quarto.yml` or the lesson and slide source files during class.

## Markdown formatting

| Syntax | Result |
|---|---|
| `**bold**` | **bold** |
| `*italic*` | *italic* |
| `` `code` `` | `code` |
| `[link](url)` | [link](https://example.com) |
| `## Heading` | A level-2 heading |
| `- item` | A bullet |
| `1. item` | A numbered item |
| `> quote` | A block quote |

## R Markdown chunk options

```` text
```{r my-chunk, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
```
````

| Option | Effect |
|---|---|
| `echo=FALSE` | Hide code, show output |
| `eval=FALSE` | Show code, do not run it |
| `include=FALSE` | Run code silently |
| `message=FALSE` | Hide messages |
| `warning=FALSE` | Hide warnings in output |
| `fig.width=7` | Figure creation width |
| `fig.cap="..."` | Figure caption |

## Quarto chunk options

```` markdown
```{r}`r ''`
#| label: fig-example
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-cap: "An informative caption."
#| fig-alt: "A concise description of the figure."
```
````

Use lowercase YAML booleans in `#|` lines. Figure and table labels begin `fig-` and `tbl-` when you want cross-references.

## Inline R

To insert a computed value, use an inline R expression. For example, the literal source syntax for a mean is:

`` `r knitr::inline_expr('mean(x)')` ``

The object must be created before the inline expression is evaluated during a full knit or render.

## YAML comparison

### R Markdown

```yaml
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    code_folding: hide
```

### Quarto

```yaml
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
```

## Keyboard shortcuts

| Action | Windows/Linux | macOS |
|---|---|---|
| Knit or render | Ctrl+Shift+K | Cmd+Shift+K |
| Insert R chunk | Ctrl+Alt+I | Cmd+Option+I |
| Run current chunk | Ctrl+Shift+Enter | Cmd+Shift+Enter |
| Run current line/selection | Ctrl+Enter | Cmd+Enter |

## Clean-session troubleshooting

1. Read the first useful error.
2. Note the file, chunk, and line number.
3. Confirm packages and data are loaded in the source.
4. Confirm an object is defined before it is used.
5. Fix one cause, restart R, and render again.
6. Use the closest file in `student_work/checkpoints/` for recovery.
